metadata.title: Remember cursor position
metadata.description: Remember cursor and scroll position for each note

regex.source: .setName('Delay between saving the cursor position to file')
regex.target: .setName('保存光标位置到文件的延迟时间')

regex.source: .setDesc("Useful for multi-device users. If you don't want to wait until closing Obsidian to the cursor position been saved.")
regex.target: .setDesc("适用于多设备用户。如果你不想等到关闭Obsidian后才保存光标位置，可以使用此功能")
.createEl('h2', { text: '记住光标位置 - 设置' })

regex.source: .setDesc("This plugin shouldn't scroll if you used a link to the note header like [link](note.md#header). If it did, then increase the delay until everything works. If you are not using links to page sections, set the delay to zero (slider to the left). Slider values: 0-300 ms (default value: 100 ms).")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果您通过链接跳转到笔记标题（如 [link](note.md#header)），此插件不应滚动。如果仍然发生滚动，请增加延迟值直到问题解决。如果您不使用页面段落链接，请将延迟设置为零（滑块向左）。滑块取值范围：0-300 毫秒（默认值：100 毫秒）。")
